Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Syphren]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Syphren is a knife that looks like a clear slice of glass with a thousand bright green hands pressing against it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Syphren is a knife that whispers commands to its wielder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Syphren's blade can sink into metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Syphren is an Awakened blade that whispers to its user and desires the lives of others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Syphren was shouting hysterically.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Syphren cackled at the chance to draw blood as the blade flew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Syphren is a knife named 'The Whispering Death' that can feed on anything it does to protect itself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Syphren is a knife that killed a Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Syphren is a weapon with a green transparent blade that can steal power from a Child of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Syphren's blade was wrapped in bandages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — It is unknown if Syphren is a Soulbound.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Syphren is Shera's Awakened blade and a Soulbound Vessel that speaks to her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Syphren is an Awakened shear that looks like dark glass with glowing green hands pressing against its surface.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Syphren is a weapon that Shera keeps in a sheath and it mumbles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Syphren is currently sealed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Syphren is a Vessel that Shera can put her hand to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Shera has a knife named Syphren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Syphren possesses powers that can heal Shera physically.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Syphren is an object on Shera's belt that seems to stir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Syphren's consciousness burns awareness into Shera's thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Syphren is a presence within Shera that can be wrapped in binding cloth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Syphren has an influence over Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Syphren is a weapon or entity that can draw life away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Syphren is Shera's Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Syphren has a glass blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Syphren has the ability to pierce Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Syphren urged the female character to sink back into the comfortable haze of combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Syphren is a blade that was locked in an invested chest on the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Syphren is an object kept in a box that has an Intent that can wash over people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Syphren is an entity that Shera uses to influence her mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Syphren is a weapon Shera carries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Syphren is a Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Syphren has ghostly hands pressed against a transparent blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Syphren was nearly dead and impaled on a Blackwatch spike.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Alchemists are attempting to make progress with Syphren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Syphren is a power or entity that Shera has not yet freed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Shera lost a piece of herself in Syphren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Syphren is a Vessel that was pierced by Bliss' black iron spike.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Syphren's blade resembles dead green bottle-glass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Shera carries Syphren in her left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Shera had a sealed Syphren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Syphren is invested to break through defenses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Syphren's voice is hungry and tears at reason.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Syphren was made to pierce defenses and turn a target's power against itself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Shera kept a hand on Syphren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Syphren is a voice in Shera's head that wants her to kill someone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Syphren wanted a meal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Syphren has a sense of life and power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Syphren is a Vessel that wants to devour delicious power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Shera can unleash Syphren’s power to tear green light from a chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Syphren is a being that hungers for power and can drink energy from others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Syphren sensed no person behind the power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Syphren was invested to turn power against itself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Syphren's shear broke down the Great Elder's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Syphren's power ran through Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Syphren is present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera could kill Bareius by tearing out his life with Syphren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Syphren has the ability to sense everyone's presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Syphren is invested to turn defenses against themselves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Syphren did not give Shera an urge to consume the hazy green orbs.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
